description: Global copper price fluctuations directly impact portfolio company revenues and ZCCM-IH dividend income.
mitigationPlan: Diversify portfolio into energy and non-mining sectors; maintain hedging instruments.

description: Risk of underground accidents at Konkola Deep Mine due to aging infrastructure and high water table.
mitigationPlan: Invest ZMW 2.5B in safety upgrades; implement real-time monitoring systems.

description: Risk of operational disruption following IRH/Delta Mining acquisition of 51% stake in 2024.
mitigationPlan: Establish joint integration committee; maintain ZCCM-IH board representation.

description: Government changes to mining royalty rates under the Mines and Minerals Development Act could reduce portfolio profitability.
mitigationPlan: Engage Ministry of Mines in policy consultations; model impact scenarios.

description: ZESCO load shedding and Kariba water levels affect CEC's ability to supply power to mining customers.
mitigationPlan: Invest in alternative energy sources; negotiate backup supply agreements.

description: Inadequate coal ash disposal from the 300MW power plant poses environmental and regulatory risk.
mitigationPlan: Construct engineered ash disposal facility; explore ash utilisation in cement production.
